sign_in_email_description: Enter your email below to login to your account
sign_in_oauth_description: Choose one of the providers below to login to your account
no_account: Don't have an account? Too bad.
sign_in_error: There was an error when signing in. Please try again.
forgot_password_description: Enter your email below to reset your password.
error_not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist. Please check the URL and try again.
error_contact_admin: Please contact the site administrator if you think this shouldn't happen.
sign_in_passkey_error: There was an error when signing in with passkey. Please try again.
delete_passkey_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey? This action cannot be undone.
delete_passkey_error: There was an error deleting the passkey. Please try again.
